items.title: Processing Millions of Records Through Shopify: Lessons From High-Volume Integrations
items.description:
Your Shopify integration works great. Until it doesn't.

At 1,000 records a day, a simple loop with API calls is fine. At 500,000 records a day, that same loop becomes an eight-hour backlog, a wall of 429 errors, and inventory numbers nobody trusts.

items.title: Grid in Html
items.description:
What Is CSS Grid?

CSS Grid is a two-dimensional layout system that allows developers to arrange elements into rows and columns. Unlike Flexbox, which is primarily designed for one-dimensional layouts Grid can manage both dimensions simultaneously.

items.title: Metadata-Only Tracing: Privacy-First Observability for AI Agents
items.description:
